legal.hub.title: Terms & Legal
legal.hub.intro: Fan Session is a platform that connects fans and creators for paid 1:1 video sessions. Fan Session acts solely as an intermediary. Any session contract is concluded directly between the fan and the creator. Payments are processed via Stripe, and sessions may be conducted through third-party video providers such as Google Meet or Zoom.
legal.hub.fanTermsDesc: Rules and conditions that apply when using Fan Session as a fan, including booking, payments, refunds, conduct, and account use.
legal.hub.creatorTermsDesc: Rules and conditions that apply when using Fan Session as a creator, including profile obligations, payouts, cancellations, reviews, and off-platform restrictions.
legal.hub.privacyDesc: Information about what personal data Fan Session collects, how it is used, which third parties are involved, and what rights users have under applicable privacy laws.
legal.hub.note: Please review the terms that apply to your account type before using the platform. By registering, users confirm acceptance of the applicable terms.
legal.fanTerms.title: TERMS AND CONDITIONS FOR FANS (II)
legal.fanTerms.subtitle: FAN SESSION
legal.fanTerms.intro:
These Terms and Conditions (“Terms”) supplement the Service Agreement (“Service Agreement”) entered into between the Fan and the Provider and govern the use of the Fan Session platform and app by the Fan. In the event of any conflict between these Terms and the Service Agreement, the Service Agreement shall prevail.
Provider: Fan-session.com – George Jerjes, c/o Online-Impressum #7159, Europaring 90, 53757 Sankt Augustin, Germany.
legal.fanTerms.s1Body:
1.1  These Terms apply to all Fans who register on and use the Fan Session platform or app.
1.2  By registering and checking the corresponding box, the Fan confirms having read and accepted these Terms.
1.3  Fan Session reserves the right to amend these Terms at any time with effect for the future. Changes will be communicated to the Fan in a timely manner. Continued use of the platform after notification of changes constitutes acceptance.
legal.fanTerms.s2Body:
2.1  Use of Fan Session requires the creation of a Fan Account. The Fan provides a username, a valid email address, and a password. A profile picture may optionally be uploaded.
2.2  The Fan must be at least 18 years of age at the time of registration.
2.3  The Fan is obligated to provide truthful information and to keep login credentials confidential. The Fan is liable for all activities carried out through their Fan Account.
2.4  Each person may maintain only one Fan Account. Multiple accounts may be suspended without prior notice.
legal.fanTerms.s3Body:
3.1  Fan Session provides the Fan with a platform through which they can browse Creator profiles and book paid one-on-one video sessions (“Sessions”) with Creators.
3.2  Fan Session acts solely as an intermediary. The contract for the Session (“Session Contract”) is entered into exclusively between the Fan and the respective Creator. Fan Session does not become a party to the Session Contract.
3.3  Fan Session does not guarantee the quality, accuracy, completeness, or legality of the services offered by Creators.
legal.fanTerms.s4Body:
4.1  The Fan selects a Creator’s offering and an available time slot and submits a booking request.
4.2  After submitting the booking request, the Fan is prompted to pay the agreed fee as an advance payment to Fan Session. Payment processing is handled by the payment service provider Stripe. Fan Session does not store any credit card or bank details of the Fan.
4.3  The Session Contract between Fan and Creator is only concluded upon receipt of payment by Fan Session (condition precedent).
4.4  The advance payment is retained by Fan Session until the booked time slot has expired and is then paid out to the Creator after deduction of the commission.
legal.fanTerms.s5Body:
5.1  The Fan undertakes to appear punctually and ready to participate at the agreed time slot for the Session.
5.2  The Fan shall treat the Creator with respect and decency. Insults, threats, discrimination, harassment of any kind, and any unlawful conduct toward the Creator are prohibited.
5.3  The Fan may not record, reproduce, distribute, or publish the Session or parts thereof without the Creator’s express prior written consent.
5.4  The Fan may not request the Creator to provide unlawful, morally objectionable, or otherwise impermissible content or services during the Session.
5.5  The Fan may not request the Creator to continue the communication or contractual relationship outside of Fan Session in order to circumvent the platform.
5.6  Fan reviews must be truthful and objective. Reviews containing insulting, discriminatory, or manifestly untrue content may be removed by Fan Session.
legal.fanTerms.s6Body:
6.1  Pursuant to the terms of their Intermediary Agreement with Fan Session, the Creator is obligated to conduct the booked Session at the agreed time slot and to provide the described service.
6.2  The Creator shall treat the Fan with respect and decency and may not discriminate against, insult, or harass the Fan.
6.3  The Creator may not record, reproduce, distribute, or publish the Session or parts thereof without the Fan’s express prior written consent.
6.4  The Creator is obligated to offer only legal services and to hold any required permits or licenses.
legal.fanTerms.s7Body:
7.1  Cancellation by the Fan is possible free of charge up to 24 hours before the booked time slot. The advance payment will be refunded in full in this case.
7.2  In the event of cancellation within 24 hours before the booked time slot, no refund is owed unless the Creator has also cancelled or failed to conduct the Session.
7.3  If the Creator has not conducted or has cancelled the Session, the Fan will receive a full refund of the advance payment.
7.4  Complaints must be submitted to Fan Session within 7 days after the booked time slot.
legal.fanTerms.s9Body:
9.1  The liability of Fan Session is governed by the provisions of the Service Agreement.
9.2  Fan Session is not liable for the Creator’s fulfilment of the Session Contract. Claims arising from the Session Contract must be asserted directly against the Creator.
9.3  Fan Session is not liable for temporary unavailability of the platform due to maintenance, technical disruptions, or force majeure.
legal.fanTerms.s10Body:
10.1  All rights to the Fan Session platform, including design, logos, software, and content, are owned by the Provider.
10.2  The Fan receives a simple, non-transferable right to use the platform for the duration of the account’s existence.
legal.fanTerms.s11Body:
11.1  These Terms apply from registration for an indefinite period.
11.2  The Fan may terminate their account at any time via the “Delete Account” function in the app.
11.3  Fan Session may suspend or delete the Fan Account with immediate effect in the event of serious violations of these Terms.
11.4  Already booked and paid Sessions remain unaffected by termination, provided the Session has not yet taken place. In this case, the advance payment will be refunded.
legal.fanTerms.s12Body:
12.1  German law applies.
12.2  Should any provision of these Terms be or become invalid, the validity of the remaining provisions shall remain unaffected.
12.3  For consumers, the statutory provisions on jurisdiction apply. Otherwise, the place of jurisdiction is the registered office of the Provider.
legal.creatorTerms.title: TERMS AND CONDITIONS FOR CREATORS (II)
legal.creatorTerms.subtitle: FAN SESSION
legal.creatorTerms.intro:
These Terms and Conditions (“Terms”) supplement the Intermediary Agreement (“Intermediary Agreement”) entered into between the Creator and the Provider and govern the use of the Fan Session platform and app by the Creator. In the event of any conflict between these Terms and the Intermediary Agreement, the Intermediary Agreement shall prevail.
Provider: Fan-session.com – George Jerjes, c/o Online-Impressum #7159, Europaring 90, 53757 Sankt Augustin, Germany.
legal.creatorTerms.s1Body:
1.1  These Terms apply to all Creators who register on and use the Fan Session platform or app.
1.2  By registering and checking the corresponding box, the Creator confirms having read and accepted these Terms.
1.3  Fan Session reserves the right to amend these Terms at any time with effect for the future. Changes will be communicated to the Creator in a timely manner. Continued use of the platform after notification of changes constitutes acceptance.
legal.creatorTerms.s2Body:
2.1  Use of Fan Session as a Creator requires the creation of a Creator Account. The Creator provides a username, a valid email address, and a password. The Creator also uploads a profile picture and a cover photo and selects a service category (area of activity).
2.2  The Creator must be at least 18 years of age at the time of registration.
2.3  The Creator is obligated to provide truthful information and to keep login credentials confidential. The Creator is liable for all activities carried out through their Creator Account.
2.4  Each person may maintain only one Creator Account.
2.5  To receive payouts from Session Contracts, the Creator must link a Stripe account with Fan Session. Without a linked Stripe account, no payouts can be made.
legal.creatorTerms.s3Body:
3.1  Fan Session provides the Creator with a platform on which they can create a profile, present their offerings, and receive and manage booking requests from Fans.
3.2  Fan Session generates a meeting link for each booked Session (e.g., via Google Meet or Zoom), which is made accessible to both parties on the platform.
3.3  Fan Session acts solely as an intermediary. The Session Contract is entered into exclusively between the Creator and the respective Fan.
3.4  Fan Session handles payment processing: collection of the advance payment from the Fan, retention of the commission (pursuant to the Intermediary Agreement), and payout to the Creator.
legal.creatorTerms.s4Body:
4.1  The Creator undertakes to conduct the booked Session at the agreed time slot and to provide the service described in their offering at an appropriate quality level.
4.2  The Creator shall treat the Fan with respect and decency. Insults, threats, discrimination, harassment of any kind, and any unlawful conduct toward the Fan are prohibited.
4.3  The Creator may not record, reproduce, distribute, or publish the Session or parts thereof without the Fan’s express prior written consent.
4.4  The Creator is obligated to offer only legal services within the area of activity specified on Fan Session.
4.5  The Creator may not solicit Fans to continue the communication or contractual relationship outside of Fan Session or to use alternative payment platforms. A violation constitutes grounds for extraordinary termination and may give rise to claims for damages.
4.6  The Creator bears sole responsibility for the accuracy of their offering details, including prices, availability, and service descriptions.
4.7  If the activity requires an official permit or license, the Creator must ensure that it is maintained throughout the entire term of the contract.
legal.creatorTerms.s5Body:
5.1  Pursuant to their Terms and the Service Agreement with Fan Session, the Fan is obligated to appear punctually at the agreed time slot and to treat the Creator respectfully.
5.2  The Fan may not record, reproduce, or distribute the Session without the Creator’s consent.
5.3  The Fan may not request the Creator to perform unlawful or impermissible acts.
legal.creatorTerms.s6Body:
6.1  Compensation and commission arrangements are governed by the Intermediary Agreement between the Creator and Fan Session.
6.2  Fan Session retains the agreed commission after the booked time slot has expired and pays the remaining amount to the Creator via Stripe.
6.3  The Creator is solely responsible for the proper tax treatment of their income.
legal.creatorTerms.s7Body:
7.1  If the Creator cancels a Session, the Fan’s advance payment is refunded in full.
7.2  Repeated cancellations by the Creator may result in a downgrade in the Creator Pool or suspension of the Creator Account.
7.3  If the Fan cancels more than 24 hours before the booked time slot, the advance payment is refunded to the Fan; the Creator receives no compensation in this case.
legal.creatorTerms.s8Body:
8.1  After each completed Session, the Fan and Creator may rate each other (1–5 stars, optionally with a written comment).
8.2  Fan reviews are publicly displayed on the Creator profile.
8.3  Fan Session reserves the right to remove reviews that are insulting, discriminatory, manifestly untrue, or otherwise unlawful.
8.4  The Creator may block individual Fans. Blocked Fans can no longer enter into Session Contracts with the Creator or contact the Creator through Fan Session.
legal.creatorTerms.s10Body:
10.1  The liability of Fan Session is governed by the provisions of the Intermediary Agreement.
10.2  Fan Session is not liable for the Fan’s fulfilment of the Session Contract. Claims arising from the Session Contract must be asserted directly against the Fan.
10.3  Fan Session is not liable for temporary unavailability of the platform due to maintenance, technical disruptions, or force majeure.
10.4  The Creator shall indemnify and hold Fan Session harmless from all third-party claims arising from the Creator’s unlawful use of the platform.
legal.creatorTerms.s11Body:
11.1  All rights to the Fan Session platform, including design, logos, software, and content, are owned by the Provider.
11.2  The Creator receives a simple, non-transferable right to use the platform for the duration of the contractual term.
11.3  The Creator grants Fan Session the right to use the profile content uploaded by the Creator (profile picture, cover photo, description texts) for display on the platform and for promotional purposes for Fan Session.
legal.creatorTerms.s12Body:
12.1  These Terms apply from registration for an indefinite period.
12.2  Termination is governed by the provisions of the Intermediary Agreement.
12.3  Fan Session may suspend or delete the Creator Account with immediate effect in the event of serious violations of these Terms or the Intermediary Agreement.
legal.creatorTerms.s13Body:
13.1  German law applies.
13.2  The place of jurisdiction is the registered office of the Provider.
13.3  Should any provision of these Terms be or become invalid, the validity of the remaining provisions shall remain unaffected.
legal.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
legal.privacy.subtitle: FAN SESSION – APP AND WEB PLATFORM
legal.privacy.s1Body:
The data controller within the meaning of the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and other applicable data protection laws is:
George Jerjes, Fan-session.com, c/o Online-Impressum #7159, Europaring 90, 53757 Sankt Augustin, Germany.
Email: Kontakt@fan-session.com
legal.privacy.s2Body: The Fan Session app and web platform (“Platform”) processes personal data of two user groups: Fans and Creators. This Privacy Policy informs you about the nature, scope, and purposes of the collection and use of personal data.
legal.privacy.s3Body:
3.1  Fan Data
When registering and using the Platform as a Fan, the following data is collected: username, email address, password (stored in encrypted form), profile picture (optional). During use of the Platform, booking data (booked Sessions, time slots, selected Creators) as well as reviews and comments are also collected.

3.2  Creator Data
When registering and using the Platform as a Creator, the following data is collected: username, email address, password (stored in encrypted form), profile picture, cover photo, service category (area of activity), hourly rate. Additionally, booking data, reviews and comments, and Stripe account data for payouts are collected.

3.3  Payment Data
Payment processing is handled by the third-party provider Stripe, Inc. Fan Session itself does not store any credit card, debit card, or bank data of users. Stripe processes and stores payment-related data in accordance with its own privacy policy (https://stripe.com/privacy). Stripe collects, among other things, card numbers, expiration dates, transaction amounts, and timestamps.

3.4  Video Sessions
The Platform supports one-on-one video calls between Fans and Creators. Video sessions are conducted via third-party services (e.g., Google Meet or Zoom). Fan Session does not record video sessions and does not store any content of the video calls. Data processing by the respective video conferencing provider is governed by its own privacy policy.

3.5  Technical Data
When using the Platform, technical data is automatically collected, including IP address, device type, operating system, browser type and version, time of access, and pages visited. This data is required for the technical provision and security of the Platform.
legal.privacy.s4Title: § 4  Purposes and Legal Bases for Processing
legal.privacy.s4Body:
4.1  Contract Performance (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR): Processing of registration data for the creation and management of user accounts; processing of booking data for the mediation between Fans and Creators; processing of payment data via Stripe for payment settlement.

4.2  Legitimate Interests (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR): Processing of technical data to ensure IT security and stability of the Platform; processing of reviews for quality assurance and transparency for other users; analysis of platform usage for improvement and further development of the Platform.

4.3  Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR): Where the user consents to the processing of their data for specific purposes (e.g., optional profile picture), processing is based on consent. Consent may be revoked at any time.

4.4  Legal Obligation (Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR): Where statutory retention obligations exist (e.g., tax-related retention periods for transaction data), we process the data on the basis of such obligations.
legal.privacy.s5Body:
5.1  User account information is stored in a database.

5.2  The application backend is hosted on Amazon Web Services (AWS) servers. AWS processes data on behalf of Fan Session on the basis of a data processing agreement.

5.3  Payment-related data is stored and processed by Stripe.
legal.privacy.s6Title: § 6  Disclosure of Data to Third Parties
legal.privacy.s6Body:
6.1  Personal data is only disclosed to third parties where this is necessary for the performance of the contract, where a legal obligation exists, or where the user has consented.

6.2  The following third-party providers have access to data in connection with the use of the Platform: Stripe, Inc. (payment processing); Amazon Web Services, Inc. (hosting); Google LLC or Zoom Video Communications, Inc. (video conferencing, depending on the service used).

6.3  Where data is transferred to third countries (in particular the USA), we ensure an adequate level of data protection through appropriate safeguards (e.g., EU Standard Contractual Clauses, adequacy decisions).
legal.privacy.s7Body:
7.1  Account information is stored for as long as the user account is active.

7.2  Upon deletion of the account, the associated personal data is removed from our database, unless statutory retention obligations prevent this.

7.3  Transaction data may continue to be stored by Stripe in accordance with statutory retention periods for financial and tax data.

7.4  Reviews and comments may remain in anonymized form after account deletion where there is a legitimate interest in transparency for other users.
legal.privacy.s8Body:
8.1  Under the GDPR, you have the following rights: right of access (to your data stored by us, Art. 15 GDPR); right to rectification (of inaccurate data, Art. 16 GDPR); right to erasure (Art. 17 GDPR); right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR); right to data portability (Art. 20 GDPR); right to object to processing (Art. 21 GDPR).

8.2  You have the right to revoke any consent given at any time without affecting the lawfulness of processing carried out on the basis of consent prior to its revocation (Art. 7(3) GDPR).

8.3  You have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority (Art. 77 GDPR). The competent supervisory authority depends on your place of residence or the registered office of the data controller.

8.4  To exercise your rights, please contact: Kontakt@fan-session.com.
legal.privacy.s9Body:
9.1  Fan Session takes appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against unauthorized access, loss, destruction, or alteration.

9.2  Passwords are stored in encrypted form. Data transmission is carried out via encrypted connections (SSL/TLS).
legal.privacy.s10Body:
10.1  The Platform may use technically necessary cookies that are required for the functioning of the Platform (e.g., for maintaining the session). These cookies are set on the basis of Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR.

10.2  Analytics or advertising cookies are only set with the user’s express consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR).
legal.privacy.s11Body:
11.1  Fan Session reserves the right to amend this Privacy Policy at any time. The current version is available in the app and on the web platform.

11.2  In the event of material changes, users will be notified via the app or by email.
legal.privacy.s12Body:
If you have any questions about data protection or wish to exercise your rights, please contact:
George Jerjes, Fan-session.com, c/o Online-Impressum #7159, Europaring 90, 53757 Sankt Augustin, Germany.
Email: Kontakt@fan-session.com
contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Fan Session connects fans and creators through premium 1:1 video sessions. Whether you have a question, need support, or want to get in touch, we'd love to hear from you.
contact.note: We aim to make every interaction smooth, secure, and personal.
contact.helperText: We usually respond as soon as possible.
contact.success: Your message has been submitted successfully.
contact.validationRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
contact.validationEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
legal.hub.imprintDesc: Legal information about the provider, owner, contact details, and responsible person for the content of Fan Session.
legal.imprint.title: Online Impressum
legal.imprint.responsible: Responsible for the content (§ 18 para. 2 MStV):
legal.imprint.legalNoticeBody:
Fan Session is operated by George Jerjes as a private individual. The platform acts solely as an intermediary between fans and creators for the purpose of facilitating paid 1:1 video sessions. Fan Session is not a party to any session contract concluded between a fan and a creator.

Despite careful content control, we assume no liability for the content of external links. The operators of linked pages are solely responsible for their content.

All content published on this platform is subject to German copyright law. Any use, reproduction, or distribution requires the prior written consent of the respective author or rights holder.
